unit.name: Deprecated oEmbed wrapper handoff behavior
unit.public_contract: This fixture executes copied WordPress 7.0 wp-includes/class-oembed.php in isolated PHP CLI probes with a deterministic class-wp-oembed.php required-file stub. It observes deprecation metadata, basename(__FILE__) handoff, ABSPATH/WPINC require_once resolution, WP_oEmbed class handoff, and include/require_once idempotency without claiming WP_oEmbed provider internals or installed oEmbed routes.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass real WP_oEmbed provider internals, REST oEmbed controller behavior, installed oEmbed routes, selected upstream PHPUnit, and ecosystem fixtures before claiming public PHP ownership.
